parameters.query: SELECT id, name, whatsapp_instance, owner_number, timezone, prompt_name, services_text, schedule_text::text AS schedule_text FROM businesses WHERE whatsapp_instance = '{{ $json.body.instance }}' AND active = true LIMIT 1

WITH horario AS (
  SELECT
    key::int                        AS dia_semana,
    (value->>'open')::int           AS hora_open,
    (value->>'close')::int - 1      AS hora_close_last
  FROM businesses,
       jsonb_each(schedule_text)
  WHERE id = {{ $('Procesar Mensaje').item.json.businessId }}
),
slots AS (
  SELECT
    d.fecha_slot,
    generate_series(
      d.fecha_slot + (h.hora_open  || ' hours')::interval,
      d.fecha_slot + (h.hora_close_last || ' hours')::interval,
      '1 hour'::interval
    )::time AS hora
  FROM (
    SELECT
      (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date + n AS fecha_slot
    FROM generate_series(0, 7) AS n
  ) d
  JOIN horario h
    ON EXTRACT(DOW FROM d.fecha_slot) = h.dia_semana
)
SELECT
  s.fecha_slot::text                 AS fecha,
  to_char(s.hora, 'HH12:MI AM')      AS slot
FROM slots s
WHERE s.hora NOT IN (
  SELECT hora
  FROM appointments
  WHERE business_id = {{ $('Procesar Mensaje').item.json.businessId }}
    AND fecha = s.fecha_slot
    AND estado != 'Cancelada'
)
ORDER BY s.fecha_slot, s.hora

SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM appointments WHERE business_id = {{ $('Procesar Mensaje').item.json.businessId }} AND fecha = TO_DATE('{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[2] }}', 'DD/MM/YYYY') AND hora = '{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[3].split('\n')[0].trim() }}'::time AND estado != 'Cancelada'

INSERT INTO appointments (business_id, fecha, hora, nombre, servicio, numero, estado) VALUES ({{ $('Verificar Slot').item.json.businessId }}, TO_DATE('{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[2] }}', 'DD/MM/YYYY'), '{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[3].split('\n')[0].trim() }}'::time, '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.pushName }}', '{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[1] }}', '{{ $('Procesar Mensaje').item.json.numero.replace('@s.whatsapp.net','') }}', 'Pendiente') RETURNING id, fecha::text, hora::text, nombre, servicio, numero, estado

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: Lo sentimos, ese horario ya está reservado. ¿Te gustaría elegir otra hora? 😊

parameters.query:
SELECT id, fecha::text, hora::text, servicio, estado
FROM appointments
WHERE numero = '{{ $('Procesar Mensaje').item.json.numero.replace('@s.whatsapp.net','') }}'
  AND business_id = {{ $('Procesar Mensaje').item.json.businessId }}
  AND fecha >= (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
  AND estado IN ('Pendiente', 'Confirmada')
ORDER BY fecha ASC, hora ASC

UPDATE appointments
SET fecha = TO_DATE('{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[2] }}', 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
    hora  = '{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[3].split('\n')[0].trim() }}'::time,
    estado = 'Pendiente',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('AI Agent').item.json.output.split('|')[1] }}
  AND business_id = {{ $('Procesar Mensaje').item.json.businessId }}
  AND estado IN ('Pendiente', 'Confirmada')
RETURNING id, fecha::text, hora::text, servicio, estado

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{   (function() {    const row = $json;    const servicio = row.servicio || '';    const hora = row.hora ? row.hora.substring(0,5) : '';    const [hh, mm] = hora.split(':').map(Number);    const ampm = hh < 12 ? 'AM' : 'PM';    const h12 = hh === 0 ? 12 : hh > 12 ? hh - 12 : hh;    const horaAmPm = `${h12}:${String(mm).padStart(2,'0')} ${ampm}`;    const diasSemana = ['domingo','lunes','martes','miércoles','jueves','viernes','sábado'];    const meses = ['enero','febrero','marzo','abril','mayo','junio','julio','agosto','septiembre','octubre','noviembre','diciembre'];    const d = new Date(row.fecha + 'T00:00:00');    const fechaNatural = `${diasSemana[d.getUTCDay()]} ${d.getUTCDate()} de ${meses[d.getUTCMonth()]}`;    return `✅ ¡Listo! Tu cita de ${servicio} quedó reagendada para el ${fechaNatural} a las ${horaAmPm}. ¡Te esperamos! 😊`;  })()}}

parameters.query:
SELECT id, accion, citas
FROM sessions
WHERE business_id = {{ $json.businessId }}
  AND numero = '{{ $json.numeroLimpio }}'
  AND expires_at > NOW()
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1

parameters.name: text

parameters.query:
SELECT messages
FROM conversation_history
WHERE business_id = {{ $json.businessId }}
  AND numero = '{{ $json.numeroLimpio }}'
  AND expires_at > NOW()
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO conversation_history (business_id, numero, messages, updated_at, expires_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $('AI Agent').item.json.businessId }},
  '{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.numeroLimpio }}',
  '{{ $('AI Agent').item.json.historyJSON }}'::jsonb,
  NOW(),
  NOW() + INTERVAL '2 hours'
)
ON CONFLICT (business_id, numero)
DO UPDATE SET
  messages   = EXCLUDED.messages,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at,
  expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at;

DELETE FROM conversation_history WHERE expires_at < NOW();
